Medical Doctor.career_description: Medical doctors diagnose and treat illnesses, prescribe medications, perform surgeries, and provide preventive care. They work in hospitals, clinics, and private practice.
Medical Doctor.job_outlook: Very High - Ghana has a doctor-to-patient ratio of 1:10,000 in rural areas
Medical Doctor.licensing_body: Medical and Dental Council of Ghana

Pharmacist.career_description: Pharmacists dispense medications, counsel patients on drug use, ensure pharmaceutical safety, and work in hospitals, community pharmacies, and pharmaceutical companies.

Nurse.career_description: Nurses provide patient care, administer medications, assist doctors, and promote health education. They work in hospitals, clinics, schools, and community health settings.
Nurse.job_outlook: Very High - Critical shortage across Ghana
Nurse.licensing_body: Nursing and Midwifery Council of Ghana

Software Engineer.career_description: Software engineers design, develop, and maintain software applications, websites, and systems. They write code, test software, and solve technical problems.
Software Engineer.job_outlook: Very High - Digital transformation across all sectors

Civil Engineer.career_description: Civil engineers design, construct, and maintain infrastructure projects like roads, bridges, buildings, water systems, and airports.

Lawyer.career_description: Lawyers represent clients in court, provide legal advice, draft legal documents, and advocate for justice. They specialize in various areas like corporate, criminal, family, or human rights law.
Lawyer.job_outlook: High - Corporate legal services and human rights advocacy

Accountant.career_description: Accountants prepare financial records, conduct audits, manage taxes, and provide financial advice to organizations and individuals.

Architect.career_description: Architects design buildings and structures, create blueprints, and oversee construction projects, combining creativity with technical knowledge.

Teacher.career_description: Teachers educate students at basic, secondary, or tertiary levels, shape young minds, and prepare the next generation of Ghanaian leaders.

Agricultural Scientist.career_description: Agricultural scientists research crop production, soil management, sustainable farming, and work to improve food security in Ghana.
Agricultural Scientist.job_outlook: Growing - Focus on food security and agricultural innovation

Public Health Officer.career_description: Public health officers promote health, prevent disease, manage community health programs, and respond to health emergencies.
Public Health Officer.job_outlook: High - Focus on disease prevention and health promotion

Business Analyst.career_description: Business analysts analyze business processes, identify improvements, gather requirements, and bridge the gap between business and technology teams.
